instruction: Write a Common Lisp macro `with-trace` that prints an `Enter LABEL` line before the body and an `Exit LABEL` line after the body, evaluating the label only once and guaranteeing the exit message via unwind-protect.
original_failure_log_excerpt:
MISMATCH
EXPECTED: (LET ((#:G1 "compute"))
            (FORMAT T "~&Enter ~A~%" #:G1)
            (UNWIND-PROTECT (PROGN (HEAVY-WORK)) (FORMAT T "~&Exit ~A~%" #:G1)))
ACTUAL:   (LET ((#:G112 "compute"))
            (FORMAT T "~&Enter ~A~%" #:G112)
            (UNWIND-PROTECT (PROGN (HEAVY-WORK))
              (FORMAT T "~&Exit ~A~%" #:G112)))

--- stderr ---
